    Lokesh Das

    Published: February 17, 2024

    Top-tier conferences in Robotics & Machine Learning! CSRankings.

    [C6]. [IWCMC - 2025] Md Morshed Alam, Lokesh Chandra Das, Sandip Roy, Sachin Shetty, and Weichao Wang. “RESTRAIN: Reinforcement Learning-Based Secure Framework for Trigger-Action IoT Environment.” arXiv preprint arXiv:2503.09513 (2025). Paper (To appear).

    [C5]. [ITSC - 2023] Lokesh Chandra Das, Dipankar Dasgupta, and Myounggyu Won. “Intelligent Adaptive Electric Vehicle Motion Control for Dynamic Wireless Charging.” 2023 IEEE 26th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC). IEEE, 2023. Paper

    [C4]. [IROS - 2023] Jibran Ali Abbasi, Navid Mohammad Imran, Lokesh Chandra Das, and Myounggyu Won. “WatchPed: Pedestrian crossing intention prediction using embedded sensors of smartwatch.” 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). IEEE, 2023. Paper.

    [C3]. [IROS - 2023] Yadavalli, Sushma Reddy, Lokesh Chandra Das, and Myounggyu Won. “RLPG: Reinforcement learning approach for dynamic intra-platoon gap adaptation for highway on-ramp merging.” 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). IEEE, 2023. Paper.

    [C2]. [ICML - 2021] Lokesh Chandra Das, and Myounggyu Won. “SAINT-ACC: Safety-Aware Intelligent Adaptive Cruise Control for Autonomous Vehicles Using Deep Reinforcement Learning.” International Conference on Machine Learning. PMLR, 2021. Paper.

    [C1]. [ICRA - 2021] Lokesh Das, and Myounggyu Won. “D-ACC: Dynamic Adaptive Cruise Control for Highways with Ramps Based on Deep Q-Learning.” 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). IEEE, 2021. Paper.

    [C0]. [NETAPPS2015] Lokesh Chandra Das, Muhammed Tawfiqul Islam, and Syed Faisal Hasan. “A Generalized Internet of Things (IoT) Framework for Serving Multiple Applications.” The 4th International Conference on Internet Applications, Protocols and Services (NETAPPS2015).
